creator: masini@ele.uniroma3.it
text:
PISCES is a two-dimensional device simulator which includes
models for surface mobility, impact ionization and photo-generation.
Quasi-three-dimensional simulation of cylindrically-symmetric devices is
also supported.

        From the PISCES IIB description in
        http://www-tcad.stanford.edu/tcad/programs/piscesIIb.html

Fix: =20

* E-mail masini@ele.uniroma3.it          * Fax   ++39-06-5579078       *
* Web    http://optow.ele.uniroma3.it/opto/people/gmasini.shtml        *
************************************************************************--9w3NJuMCDxVlGx5Ek2N8z6uModJu9c0VDcdoj0aCD0Rk1Hw7
